hot_topics: 奥特曼住宅燃烧弹袭击
big_event_name: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman旧金山住宅遭燃烧弹袭击（4月10日凌晨发生，4月11-12日国内广泛传播）

models.title: 今天凌晨，OpenAI奥特曼家被炸了
models.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman旧金山豪宅于4月10日凌晨遭20岁嫌疑人投掷燃烧弹袭击，被捕后扬言烧毁OpenAI总部，奥特曼回应：我理解你们对AI的恐惧

models.title: 突发！AI大佬住宅遭燃烧弹袭击！奥特曼回应：我理解你们对AI的恐惧
models.url: https://weixin.sogou.com/weixin?type=2&query=奥特曼住宅燃烧弹袭击AI恐惧
models.summary: AGI时代反AI情绪激化，事件引发对AI安全与社会影响的深层讨论，奥特曼表示理解公众对AI的恐惧心理

models.title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's San Francisco home attacked with molotov cocktail
models.summary: San Francisco police confirmed a 20-year-old suspect threw a molotov cocktail at Altman's home around 4:12am April 10. Suspect later threatened to burn down OpenAI HQ in Mission Bay.

models.title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's home targeted with molotov cocktail
models.summary: A suspect was arrested after throwing a molotov cocktail at Sam Altman's SF home, raising concerns about public hostility toward AI leaders and the AGI race.

models.title: Meta debuts new AI model Muse, attempting to catch up to Google, OpenAI
models.summary: Meta unveiled its Muse model on April 8, its first major AI model release since the $14B deal with Alexandr Wang, aiming to close the gap with OpenAI and Google.

models.title: Meta's long-awaited AI model Muse Spark is here — but can it make money?
models.summary: Meta's Muse model is live but analysts question its monetization path given massive infrastructure spend. The model follows Llama 4 and is expected to power Meta AI across apps.

models.title: GPT-5.3 Instant Mini in ChatGPT
models.summary: OpenAI released GPT-5.3 Instant Mini in ChatGPT on April 9, replacing GPT-5 as the default lightweight model, targeting faster response speeds.

models.title: 腾讯公布大模型最新进展 但跟你想的不太一样
models.summary: 腾讯披露混元模型最新路线图，主打实用方向，不追求单纯参数规模，专注企业级落地能力
